test_character.description: A member of The Seven Deadly Sins bearing the mark of Envy. As a member of the Giant Clan, she wields immense power with her sacred treasure Gideon.

costumes.name: Tavern Hostess
costumes.description: **Fortitude Shift** — Attacking an **Incapacitated** enemy restores the **Magic Gauge** by **300/400/500** and increases the hero's **Defense** by **20/25/30%** for **15 sec**. (Cooldown: **20 sec**)

costumes.name: <The Serpent Sin of Envy>
costumes.description: **Seismic Chain** — Each hit with the Special Attack on an enemy affected by **Breaker** decreases the Normal Skill cooldown by **14/17/20%** and increases **Earth** damage by **6/7/8%** for **10 sec**. (Max of each: **56/68/80%**, **24/28/32%**)

costumes.name: Cheerful Girl
costumes.description: **Earthbound Chain** — Using the Ultimate Move restores HP equal to **10/12.5/15%** of Max HP each time **Shatter Resistance** boost is gained within **15 sec**. Normal Skill damage increases by **25/30/35%** for **5 sec** when Burst is activated.

notes.costumes_format: Array of objects: { name: string, image?: string (URL), description?: string (supports **bold** markdown) }
notes.materials_format: Array of objects: { name: string, image?: string (URL to icon) }
notes.backward_compatibility: Old format ['string1', 'string2'] is still supported for costumes — the code checks typeof and handles both string and object entries
